title: eliokarmos coarctatum
intro: Eliokarmos coarctatum, also known as the "narrow-leaved eliokarmos," is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family, native to Greece and the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, eliokarmos coarctatum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant are associated with the relief of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Eliokarmos coarctatum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although the effectiveness and safety of these preparations may vary depending on the source and preparation method.
